name: capital-lens
description: Marxian analysis for the AI economy. 8 analytical frameworks sourced to Marx's primary texts. Not politics — analytical toolkit.

skills.name: capital-lens
skills.description: Analyze modern technology, platforms, and financial systems through Marx's analytical frameworks. 8 tools: surplus value, alienation, organic composition, general law, fragment on machines, primitive accumulation, commodity fetishism, falling rate of profit.
